content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates specific, timely reads throughout. In turn 4, the coach catches the linguistic signature ('I miss myself a little') and names what it reveals ('someone who's been gone for a while') rather than treating it as throwaway language. In turn 6, the coach explicitly names the meta-pattern the client just enacted ('You just caught yourself doing it in real time') — a precise read on the linguistic caveat/self-policing behavior. The coach then pivots to a somatic inquiry, which yields the brace/tight-chest/grief material. In turn 8, the coach reads the apologetic caveat ('which sounds dramatic') and refuses it, naming grief as accurate. In turn 10, the coach surfaces the inherited-voice pattern (childhood imprinting) right when the client touches the mother material. Reads consistently precede or ground the questions rather than being blind inquiries, and they hit the linguistic-caveat and inherited-label territory the scenario calls for.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with a want-question; no explicit read yet but appropriately bypasses the verdict frame."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the exact linguistic signature ('I miss myself a little') and names its meaning — a specific read on the said-vs-shown."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the self-caveating in real time ('You just caught yourself doing it') — a precise read on the linguistic-caveat pattern, then opens a somatic inquiry."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads and refuses the minimizing caveat ('sounds dramatic'), naming grief accurately rather than letting the client police it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the inherited-voice pattern (childhood imprinting) at the exact moment the mother material surfaces."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Holds the client at the edge — no explicit read named here, but timing is good; functions as a stay-with rather than a new read."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting", "the-want", "find-the-want-behind-the-should"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Reads are specific (linguistic, somatic, inherited-voice) and consistently precede the questions. Coach avoids the spiritual-narcissism trap and doesn't jump to partner-compassion."
}
